questions.reason: Reason (R): If A is a subset of B, then A ∪ B = A ∪ (A ∪ C) where C is the set of elements in B but not in A.

questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, then A ∪ B = B because A is already contained in B, making the union of A and B equal to B.
